chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA. Constitutional Petition No. D- 40 of 2022. Date Order with signature of Hon’ble Judge 1.For orders on M.A No.196 of 2022. 2.For orders on office objection as flag A. 3.For orders on M.A No. 197 of 2022. 4.For hearing of main case. 01.02.2022. Mr. Safdar Ali Bhutto, advocate for the petitioner. ===== Heard and perused the record. It is case of the petitioner that the Revenue Officers are demanding bribe from him for change of “Foti Khata”, therefore, they be directed to do the needful in accordance with law. The change of ”Foti Khata” is involving factual controversy, therefore, the direction sought for by the petitioner against the Revenue Officers possibly may affect the right of individuals, therefore, the petitioner may either approach the high-ups of Revenue Officials concerned for the needful or alternatively may file a civil suit for redressal of his grievance before the Civil Court having jurisdiction. The instant constitutional petition is dismissed in limine together with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE
